no_changes_rationale:
status: needs_investigation
reason: The current worktree already satisfies the bead's routing boundary: `cli/internal/server/workers.go` has no `buildRoutePreflight` or `RoutePreflight` wiring in `runWorker`, `cli/internal/server/workers_resolve_route_test.go` now asserts the worker-side no-ResolveRoute boundary, and the targeted `go test` subsets pass without any source changes. No additional edits were needed in this attempt.
verification_command: cd cli && go test ./internal/server -run 'TestWorker.*ResolveRoute|TestWorker_NoPreflight|TestRunWorker' -count=1 && go test ./cmd -run 'TestRoutinglintNoResolveRouteInExecutionPaths|TestRoutinglintNonStatusFilesDoNotCallResolveRoute|TestWorkDoesNotCallResolveRoute' -count=1 && cd .. && lefthook run pre-commit
